title: Faculty of Medicine Vision & Mission
content:
Faculty of Medicine Vision & Mission

Our Mission

To provide medical education based on scientific principles, committed to ethical values, and prioritizing the benefit of society; to train qualified, virtuous physicians with a developed sense of social responsibility; to generate knowledge in the field of health and make this knowledge available to society.

Our Vision

To be a faculty that prioritizes quality in medical education, supports scientific productivity, adheres to ethical values and social responsibility, trains physicians who make a difference; contributes to science through research and publication activities, conducts awareness-raising initiatives for society, and continuously renews itself in line with emerging technologies and current approaches to become internationally recognized.
